name: Canton Chicken and Vegetable Soup
recipeInstructions:
1. Use a 4-pound stewing chicken or pre-cut chicken.
- In a 5-quart kettle or pot, melt margarine and brown chicken until well-browned on all sides. Remove chicken and keep warm.
2. In the remaining fat in the pan, sauté onions, carrots, celery, and curry powder over medium heat. Stir until onions are tender and limp (about 5 minutes).
3. Return chicken to the pot. Add apple, salt, pepper, chicken broth, 5 cups cold water, and parsley. Bring to a boil, then reduce heat to simmer. Cover and simmer for 1 hour, stirring occasionally.
4. Remove chicken; add corn and lima beans and cook for an additional 30 minutes longer.
5. Cook pasta separately.
6. Skim fat from the soup. Remove skin and bones from chicken, cutting into bite-sized pieces. Return chicken to the pot and add cooked pasta shells.
7. Let stand, covered, for about 10 minutes before serving.
